elements.text: In one of your classes recently, your professor asks students to raise their hands if they've learned the day's materials before. When you look around, you notice the majority of your class has their hands raised, but you don't. This makes you feel like you're not prepared to be in the...

elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
